title: Marbella Private Yacht Charter Birthday: Costs & Tips 2026
html:
Celebrating a birthday with a private yacht charter in Marbella from Puerto Banús can cost from EUR 2,500 to EUR 8,000 for a full-day crewed experience, depending on the vessel. BoatHire24 connects you to verified skippers and boats. Planning a memorable party on the Mediterranean starts with comparing options on the platform.

How much does it cost to rent a yacht for a birthday in Marbella?

Expect to pay between EUR 2,500 and EUR 10,000 for a private crewed yacht for a day. Prices vary by boat size, season, and services included. You can browse many direct options through the marketplace.

Do you need a licence to charter a private yacht in Marbella?

No, you do not need a licence when you hire a crewed yacht with a professional skipper. The operator confirms exact requirements; for bareboat rental a Spanish licence or equivalent is needed.

A local tip: book for a Tuesday or Wednesday in June or July to secure the best berths near the sandbank at Cabopino, where the water is calmer for swimming.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most birthday charters depart from Puerto Banús, the glamorous marina lined with superyachts. Nearby options include the historic Puerto Deportivo de Marbella and the quieter Cabopino Marina. Many trips head east to the coves of La Cala de Mijas or west past the cliffs of El Saladillo towards Estepona. The bay of Marbella itself offers a protected backdrop for celebrations.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor Yacht (Sunseeker, Azimut), Best for a lively party with DJ and bar, up to 12 guests, from EUR 4,500.
  2. Sailing Catamaran (Lagoon, Fountaine Pajot), Ideal for group dinners and stable cruising, 12, 14 guests, from EUR 3,000.
  3. Flybridge Cruiser (Fairline, Princess), Great for a chic sit-down meal and sunset views, 8, 10 guests, from EUR 3,500.
  4. Luxury Tender (Axopar), Perfect for a small, adventurous trip to a beach club, 6, 8 guests, from EUR 1,500.

For a celebratory birthday, the 27-metre Mefasa 90 from Puerto Banús stands out. You can review the Mefasa 90 listing on the platform for precise specifications and availability.

Cost breakdown for private yacht birthday charters

  • Shared sunset tour: EUR 250 per person, 2 hours, drinks included.
  • Small motorboat half-day: EUR 1,200 for up to 6 guests, no crew.
  • Catamaran full-day: EUR 3,000 for 12 guests, includes skipper.
  • Crewed 15-metre yacht full-day: EUR 5,500 for 10 guests with food.

The area's abundance of marinas means you can find a vessel to suit your party size. Use the platform to compare verified boat rental Marbella options and book directly with local owners.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 3,000, 8,000 for a private full-day yacht.
  • Peak months: June to September.
  • Trip length: 4, 8 hours typical.
  • Guest capacity: up to 12 on most vessels.
  • Currency: EUR.

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can we bring our own food and drink on a birthday yacht charter?

Most skippers allow you to bring your own catering, but some offer catering packages; confirm with the owner when booking.

Is it suitable for children aged five and above?

Yes, many yachts have child-friendly safety equipment, and the crew can adjust the itinerary for family stops.

What happens if the weather is poor on the day of my 2026 booking?

Reputable operators reschedule or refund in bad weather; the platform's cancellation policy is clearly stated per listing.

How do we get to the boat from Marbella town centre?

Taxi or bus services run frequently to Puerto Banús and Puerto Deportivo, with journey times under 20 minutes.

To start planning your birthday celebration, browse the full selection of crewed yachts and motorboats on the platform. If you own a vessel and would like to host guests, list your boat with BoatHire24. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
